selected_dialects.reason: Motor end cap is a rotationally symmetric body with outer dia 250, inner bore 40 — revolve_profile is the canonical axisymmetric op; cut_center_bore, cut_circular_hole_pattern for 6x M10 on PCD200 are also axisymmetric ops.
Junction box 60x40x30 is a prismatic rectangular body — extrude_rectangle is the canonical sketch_extrude op.
Union of end cap and junction box + placement of junction box on the end cap exterior requires boolean_union and place_component/translate_solid from composition dialect.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only; not manufacturing-ready, not certified, not airworthy.
